author: Weatherman118
goal: Reverse-engineer Weatherman118's exact entry + exit system. Paper trade until 80%+ consistent win rate, then go live. ONE Pine Script = his secret sauce. Perfect it over time.

stoch_rsi.trigger: K crosses UP through 20 from below — ta.crossover(k, 20)
stoch_rsi.requirement: K must be above D at trigger
stoch_rsi.pre_entry_state: K typically at 0-10 before cross (near absolute zero) — sharper the dip, stronger the spike

smoothed_ha.trigger: Current candle must be green (sha_close > sha_open)
smoothed_ha.calculation: Double EMA(10,10) on Heikin Ashi values
smoothed_ha.note: First green candle after red = curl forming

zlsma_50.rule: NEVER enter if price is below ZLSMA-50 — trade is invalid
zlsma_50.note: ZLSMA appearing far from price during a spike = CORRECT — it's lagging by design. Far above = strong momentum = you're in the flow zone.

confirmed_exit_rules.summary: Exit in layers as price rises. Hard stop if it falls. Never hold overnight.
confirmed_exit_rules.hard_stop: -8% from entry — NO EXCEPTIONS. This is how you preserve capital. W118's edge = tiny losses, huge wins.
confirmed_exit_rules.T1: +15% — trim 1/3 of position, move stop to breakeven (entry price). You now cannot lose money.
confirmed_exit_rules.T2: +30% — trim another 1/3 (or exit 100% if using hard T2 rule). Trail stop 10% on remainder.
confirmed_exit_rules.T3: +60% — trail 10% on final 1/3, let it run. Optional: skip if you want to be out in under 2 hours.
confirmed_exit_rules.sha_exit: SHA flips red for 2+ consecutive candles — momentum fading, consider exit
confirmed_exit_rules.zlsma_exit: Price closes below ZLSMA-50 — trend broken, exit immediately
confirmed_exit_rules.stoch_exit: Stoch RSI K crosses back below 20 — momentum done, exit
confirmed_exit_rules.intraday_only: CLOSE ALL POSITIONS before market close. Never hold overnight. Small caps halt/gap/reverse-split without warning.

fast_exit_rules_3x.description: Data-derived from 101-trade analysis. All 3 toggled ON by default in Pine Script. Goal: only take trades that exit cleanly within 1-2 hours.

rule1_k_depth.description: K must have been below 10 within the 3 bars before the crossover
rule1_k_depth.rationale: 101 trades show K near 0-10 before every entry. K<10 = sharper spike, faster exit.
rule1_k_depth.pine: k_was_low = k[1] < 10 or k[2] < 10 or k[3] < 10

rule2_time_gate.rationale: 82% of wins happen in PM or RTH open. Midday signals take hours or fail.

rule3_hard_t2.description: Exit 100% at T2 (+30%). No trailing to T3.
rule3_hard_t2.rationale: 82% of all 99 wins exit at ≤60%. Forcing T2 = clean 1-2hr exit across all 3 trade profiles.

trade_profiles_100pct_win.note: ALL 3 profiles have 100% win rate from 101-trade dataset. Use all 3. Cap at T2 = under 2 hours.

profile_C.name: Re-entries (Stoch RSI fully reset below 20)
profile_C.rule: Stoch RSI must RESET FULLY BELOW 20 and curl up again — not a mid-range pullback

combined_at_t2.note: Capping all 3 profiles at T2 (+30%) = 86 of 99 wins within 2 hours

features: Green BUY label showing [PM] or [RTH] profile + K value at entry
Red EXIT label when position closes
Dashed lines at entry: red=stop(-8%), lime=T1(+15%), green=T2(+30%), teal=T3(+60%)
Orange warning label when SHA turns red 2+ consecutive candles
Red warning label when K drops below 20
Red warning label when price breaks below ZLSMA-50
Gray SKIP label when base signal fires but blocked by fast-exit rules (shows reason)
Fast-Exit Rules group in settings: Rule 1 (K depth), Rule 2 (time gate), Rule 3 (hard T2)
Green/red background = above/below ZLSMA flow zone
7 alertconditions: Entry, Signal Filtered, SHA Exit, K Exit, ZLSMA Exit, Curl-No-Flow, Position Closed
pine_script_status.known_limitation: Strategy Tester shows unreliable numbers with SHA (non-standard chart warning). Do NOT trust Strategy Tester P&L or win rate. Use manual paper trade log instead.
pine_script_status.live_confirmation: AIOS 2026-05-01: BUY fired at $8.62 pre-market, stock ran to $18.64+ (+136%). System fires BEFORE the spike.

AIOS_2026_05_01.notes: BUY label fired correctly at $8.62 pre-market. Stock ran +136% intraday. Confirms system fires BEFORE the spike, not after.

AHMA_5m.context: PERFECT CURL STATE: K just crossed 20, D still at 10. This is the exact ta.crossover(k,20) moment.

key_insights: Pre-entry Stoch RSI K is consistently 0-20 (usually 0-10) on the 5m chart. ta.crossover(k,20) = start of spike, not chasing.
All 3 trade profiles (PM fresh, RTH fresh, re-entries) have 100% win rate — use all 3.
82% of all wins exit at ≤60% gain. Hard T2 exit captures most wins and forces clean sub-2hr exits.
ZLSMA far below price during a spike = CORRECT. It's lagging by design. Far above = strong flow zone.
System fires BEFORE the spike. Entry at K cross = beginning of momentum, not the top.
NEVER trust Strategy Tester with SHA-based scripts. Non-standard chart = meaningless numbers.

important_rules.intraday_only: NEVER hold overnight. Small caps halt/gap down/reverse split without warning. Close same day.
important_rules.pdt_rule: US accounts under $25k are limited to 3 day trades per 5 business days. Use Webull cash account or paper trade until $25k threshold reached.
important_rules.stop_discipline: The -8% stop is NON-NEGOTIABLE. Breaking it is how accounts blow up. W118's edge = tiny losses, huge wins.
important_rules.no_set_and_forget: Cannot automate without daily scanner running. New stocks must be found each morning. TradingView cannot auto-execute trades.
important_rules.strategy_tester_warning: Strategy Tester is UNRELIABLE with SHA scripts. Always shows non-standard chart warning. Ignore those numbers.
important_rules.one_pine_script: There is ONE Pine Script. File: pine-script/weatherman118-curl-flow.pine on branch claude/push-tradingbaby-ESEFn. Perfect this one script over time. Old versions saved in pine-script/versions/ for comparison.
important_rules.one_branch: ALWAYS use claude/push-tradingbaby-ESEFn. Never create new branches. User confirmed this 2026-05-03.

github.branch_explanation: ONE branch only: claude/push-tradingbaby-ESEFn = ALL real work. Every new chat must checkout this branch. Do NOT create new branches. main = skeleton only. Pine Script versions saved in pine-script/versions/. Compact hooks in .claude/hooks/.
github.branch_rule: NEVER create a new branch. Always work on claude/push-tradingbaby-ESEFn. User deleted extra branches 2026-05-03.

roadmap.month_1_2: Paper trade — target 80%+ win rate, 30+ trades minimum. Log every trade in journal/index.html.
roadmap.month_3: Go live with $100-$500. 1-2 trades/week (PDT limit if under $25k)
roadmap.month_4_6: Reinvest profits, scale positions. Build toward $25k.
roadmap.month_7_12: At $25k: unlimited day trading unlocked. Compounding accelerates.
roadmap.goal: $25k account with 80%+ win rate = $40k-$60k by end of year 1 at current stats

open_questions: Does SHA need 2+ consecutive green candles or just the current one?
On re-entries: full reset below 20 confirmed — but does price need to touch ZLSMA-50?
Volume multiplier: 1.5x confirmed in settings — is it ever eyeballed higher?
Session timing: PM entries have higher win rate (56%) — is midday always avoided?
